beats.narration_text: Here is why Sinc¬≤ ‚Üí Fermi's Golden Rule belongs in your working knowledge. The systems, policies, and tools shaped by it affect decisions at your level ‚Äî whether or not you understand the mechanism. Knowing the underlying logic gives you the frame; missing it means reasoning from output with no access to the inputs.
